ContactSubmission.title: Contact Submission
ContactSubmission.description: Form submissions from users reaching out via the contact form.

name.description: Full Designation or Name of the sender.

email.description: Comm Link / Email address of the sender.

message.description: The message payload describing architectural parameters.

createdAt.description: Server authorization timestamp when the transmission occurred.

Booking.title: Blueprint Booking Slot
Booking.description: Consultation call reservations made via the scheduler.

name.description: Human name of the client booking the session.

email.description: Email identifier for routing the session details.

selectedDate.description: Target calendar date for the booked blueprint strategy call.

selectedTimeSlot.description: Selected hourly slot for timezone-compliant reservation.

message.description: Optional custom message or plan details from the estimator.

createdAt.description: Server validation timestamp when the slot reservation was locked in.

VoiceMemo.title: Voice Memo Submission
VoiceMemo.description: Instant voice note captured from users describing operational bottlenecks.

duration.description: Total duration of the recorded voice note in seconds.

NewsletterSubscription.title: Newsletter Subscription
NewsletterSubscription.description: Email subscriptions registered for the newsletter or marketing updates.

email.description: Staged system email for receiving dispatch routes.

bookings/{bookingId}.description: Collection storing locked blueprint strategy consultation sessions.

newsletter_subscriptions/{subId}.description: Collection of staged newsletter system email nodes.
